name: Metagenomi Therapeutics, Inc.
business: The company is an early-stage genome editing company that has not yet initiated clinical development. It focuses on developing therapies using genome editing technologies such as programmable nucleases, base editing, and RNA and DNA-mediated integration systems. The company does not have any approved products and expects it will be many years before commercialization, if ever.
sellsTo: None, as the company has no products or revenue

exposures.sentence: We are focusing our research and development efforts on genome editing using programmable nucleases, base editing, and RNA and DNA-mediated integration systems (including prime editors and CRISPR-associated (Cas) transposases).
